title: ctenopteris mayoris
intro: Ctenopteris mayoris, also known as Mayor's fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, Ctenopteris mayoris has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ctenopteris mayoris are associated with its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Ctenopteris mayoris is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, although its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for various ailments have not been extensively scientifically proven.
